name: Bergen Golf Zone
about: Bergen Golf Zone is a golf simulator venue located in Bergen. The venue offers a range of simulator technology for golfers to practice or play virtual rounds. Pricing and specific technology details are not available on the website. The facility appears to focus on providing a space for golf simulation, though further information is needed to fully assess its offerings and target audience.
